title: rubus rivularis var. mundiflorus
intro: Rubus rivularis var. mundiflorus, also known as the Mundiflorus Raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus rivularis plant, which is a type of thorny shrub in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis var. mundiflorus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
